The API Made Distribution A Technical Fact Distribution often gets treated as business context, something that happens after the science. In the GPT line, distribution became technical. LLMs were not only software products. They were cloud commitments. Serving a popular conversational product required low-latency inference, reliability, safety systems, data handling, and a path to payment. This is one of the reasons ChatGPT frightened incumbents. teaches users to treat the web as an answerable surface. A chat assistant changes the shape of that contract. Instead of sending the user outward, it can pull the answer inward.
